Name: Super Bowl Halftime Greats
Description: Celebrate iconic artists and songs that have lit up the biggest stage in live music. Pick tracks from performers who have headlined the halftime show or songs that feel worthy of that massive spotlight.

Name: 80s vs 90s
Description: Two decades, two distinct sounds, endless debate. Choose a track that defines either the bold excess of the 80s or the alternative, hip hop, and pop revolutions of the 90s.

Name: Retail Therapy
Description: Music you would hear while wandering a store, mall, or boutique, whether it is upbeat, stylish, or oddly calming. Pick songs that make browsing feel better and wallets feel lighter.

Name: Deep Work Mode
Description: Soundtracks designed for focus, flow, and getting things done. Think instrumentals, ambient tracks, or low-distraction songs that help you stay locked in and power through your most demanding tasks.

Name: Y2K Vibes
Description: Channel the late 90s and early 2000s era when pop, hip hop, and electronic sounds collided. Think futuristic aesthetics, catchy hooks, and songs that feel perfectly at home on a burned CD.

Name: Rock On
Description: Turn the volume up and lean into guitars, drums, and raw energy. Any era or subgenre works as long as rock is clearly at the core.

Name: Boston Beats
Description: A tribute to artists with roots in or strong ties to Boston. From rock legends to hip hop and indie acts, showcase the sound of one of America’s most influential music cities.
